parameters.issueTitle: Da Nang Manufacturing: FDI capital gap

recommendation.primary: Match global investors needing manufacturing resilience with Da Nang programs: Da Nang Hi-Tech Park; Central Vietnam FDI Zone.
secondary: FDI capital gap: UNCTAD World Investment Report 2025. Local indicators show GDP growth 2.50%, FDI inflows 1.50% of GDP, and trade openness 55.00% of GDP.

Convert the gap into GDP impact by packaging investable projects around manufacturing, reducing execution friction, validating buyers/offtakers, and using Vietnam as the sovereign credibility layer for regional city delivery.
recommendation.rationale: Da Nang has ICT, Tourism, Manufacturing capability, 50/100 overlooked opportunity, and 82/100 investment momentum. Productive FDI has weakened, so overlooked regional cities need sharper investable project packaging and verified counterpart matching.

recommendation.primary: Match global investors needing manufacturing resilience with Coimbatore programs: TIDCO Industrial Park; Smart City Mission; Tamil Nadu FDI Policy.
secondary: FDI capital gap: UNCTAD World Investment Report 2025. Local indicators show GDP growth 2.50%, FDI inflows 1.50% of GDP, and trade openness 55.00% of GDP.

Convert the gap into GDP impact by packaging investable projects around manufacturing, reducing execution friction, validating buyers/offtakers, and using India as the sovereign credibility layer for regional city delivery.
recommendation.rationale: Coimbatore has Manufacturing, ICT, Textiles capability, 62/100 overlooked opportunity, and 75/100 investment momentum. Productive FDI has weakened, so overlooked regional cities need sharper investable project packaging and verified counterpart matching.
